zh.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton是Robert de Horton的兒子，於1188年出生在英國諾圖波藍德霍頓。他和Agnes de Vaux至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1257年8月24日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德霍頓享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton是Robert de Horton的儿子，于1188年出生在英国諾圖波藍德霍頓。他和Agnes de Vaux至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1257年8月24日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德霍頓享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Horton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Warwickshire): habitational name from one or other of the many places so called, such as those in Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Dorset, Gloucestershire, Herefordshire, Northamptonshire, Shropshire, Somerset, Staffordshire, Wiltshire, and Yorkshire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English horh or horu ‘dirt, filth’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some may have different origins, including Horton in Gloucestershire, which may derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + tūn.

variants.name: Horten
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farms named Horten, from an unattested word denoting ‘uneven, hard and lumpy soil’.

nameMeanings.name: Walran
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Wall, a wall, and hræfen, a raven, meaning a wall raven

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton was born in 1188, in Horton, Northumberland, England as the son of Robert de Horton. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes de Vaux. He died on 24 August 1257, in Horton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton est né en 1188, à Horton, Northumberland, Angleterre, fils de Robert de Horton. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes de Vaux. Il est décédé le 24 août 1257, à Horton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton wurde 1188 in Horton, Northumberland, England, als Sohn von Robert de Horton geboren. Er hatte mit Agnes de Vaux mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. August 1257 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Horton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton è nato il nel 1188 nel Horton, Northumberland, England come figlio di Robert de Horton. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes de Vaux. Morì il 24 agosto 1257, nel Horton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walran de Hortonは1188年にイギリスノースウンバーランドホールトンでRobert de Hortonの息子として生まれた。彼はAgnes de Vauxとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1257年8月24日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドホールトンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton(은)는 1188년 영국 노르스벌랜드 호르턴에서 Robert de Horton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnes de Vaux(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1257년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 호르턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton nasceu em 1188, em Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra filho de Robert de Horton. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes de Vaux. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1257, em Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton родился в 1188 г. в местности хауртон, нортумбирланд, Англия. Его отца звали Robert de Horton. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes de Vaux. Он умер 24 августа 1257 г. в местности хауртон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Walran de Horton nació en 1188, en Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra como hijo de Robert de Horton. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes de Vaux. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1257, en Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
